title: Closest & Opposite Meaning (Đồng Nghĩa & Trái Nghĩa)

knowledge.html:
Phuong phap làm bài tim tu đồng nghĩa (CLOSEST) va trái nghĩa (OPPOSITE)

Buoc 1: Đọc kỹ đề bài
Đọc kỹ yêu cầu cua đề bài de biet rang do la bai tim tu đồng nghĩa (CLOSEST) hay trái nghĩa (OPPOSITE). Se that la tiec neu chi vi hiểu nhầm de nen chọn nhầm đáp án, mặc dù hieu het nghia cua câu hỏi va cac lựa chọn cho sẵn. Lẽ ra chon tu đồng nghĩa nhung lai khoanh tu trái nghĩa, và ngược lại.
Buoc 2: Tim nghia cua cac tu
Trường hợp 1: Biet nghia cua tu cho sẵn o đề bài nhung cac tu chôn lại kho. Phan nay se hoi kho vi no la từ đơn, nhung ban van có thể doan nghia cua cac tu kho do bang cach tim xem no thuoc từ loại nao va duoc thanh tu tu goc nao. Dong thoi, dua vao nghia cua tu cho sẵn trong cau de suý nghĩa cua cac tu ban khong biet.

Trường hợp 2: Biet nghia cua cac lựa chọn, nhung khong biet nghia cua tu cho sẵn o đề bài. Để làm duoc cau nay, ban se dua vao nghia cua bon tu lựa chọn va ngữ cảnh cua cau de suy đoán nghia tu in đậm. Thuong thi trong bon lựa chọn se co 3 lựa chọn đồng nghĩa voi tu cho sẵn neu cau do yêu cầu tu trái nghĩa, và ngược lại se co 3 lựa chọn trái nghĩa voi tu cho sẵn neu đề bài yêu cầu tim tu đồng nghĩa. Kết hợp ngữ cảnh cua cau cho sẵn de tim ra đáp án dung.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] If you listen carefully to this piece of music, you can hear a flute in the <u>background</u>.
exercises.explanation: 'Background' = nen, boi canh ~ 'position' (vị trí). Am thanh o phia sau, o vị trí nen.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] The Internet is <u>available</u> only in cities and towns, so we cannot easily get access to it in the countryside.
exercises.explanation: 'Available' = co san, ton tai ~ 'existing' (dang ton tai). Internet chi co o thanh pho.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] Wildlife on Earth is <u>disappearing</u> fast and will continue to do so unless urgent action is taken.
exercises.explanation: 'Disappearing' = bien mat ~ 'vanishing' (bien mat). Dong vat hoang da dang bien mat nhanh.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] Pierre often helped her, and they <u>devoted</u> all their time to working in their laboratory.
exercises.explanation: 'Devoted' = cong hien, danh het ~ 'dedicated' (cong hien). Ca hai dong nghia.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] I recently posted an advertisement for a <u>vacancy</u> in Sales Department.
exercises.explanation: 'Vacancy' = vị trí trong (cong viec) ~ 'available position'. Dang tuyen nhan vien.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] I lived in the U.S. for ten years, so I've <u>lost touch</u> with British politics.
exercises.explanation: 'Lost touch with' = mat lien lac, khong con nam bat duoc ~ 'become unaware of' (khong con biet ve).

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] The law made wearing seat belts in cars <u>compulsory</u>.
exercises.explanation: 'Compulsory' = bat buoc ~ 'obligatory' (bat buoc). Luat bat buoc that day an toan.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] Some research has shown a strong <u>association</u> between pesticide and certain diseases.
exercises.explanation: 'Association' = moi lien he ~ 'connection' (su ket noi, lien quan). Co moi lien he giua thuoc tru sau va benh.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] Reaching 35 and obviously aging, Jane has to <u>make up her mind on</u> her future very soon.
exercises.explanation: 'Make up her mind on' = quyet dinh ve ~ 'make a decision on'. Ca hai deu co nghia la dua ra quyet dinh.

exercises.question: [CLOSEST] The stock market crash marked the start of a severe <u>depression</u>.
exercises.explanation: 'Depression' = suy thoai (kinh te) ~ 'recession' (suy thoai). Trong ngu canh thi truong chung khoan.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] Around one corner, a hundred goats suddenly <u>appeared</u>, in no apparent hurry to let us by.
exercises.explanation: 'Appeared' = xuat hien >< 'vanished' = bien mat. Hai tu nay trai nghia nhau.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] Global warming is one of the <u>major</u> problems facing our planet.
exercises.explanation: 'Major' = lon, chinh >< 'minor' = nho, phu. Hai tu nay trai nghia nhau.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] If we view the problem from a different angle, a solution may become more <u>obvious</u>.
exercises.explanation: 'Obvious' = ro rang >< 'unclear' = khong ro rang. Hai tu nay trai nghia nhau.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] If you're <u>willing</u> to fly at night, you can get a much cheaper ticket.
exercises.explanation: 'Willing' = san long >< 'reluctant' = mien cuong, do du. Hai tu nay trai nghia nhau.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] People should have the <u>courage</u> to stand up for their beliefs.
exercises.explanation: 'Courage' = su dung cam >< 'cowardice' = su hen nhat. Hai tu nay trai nghia nhau.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] I find it hard to work at home because there are too many <u>distractions</u>.
exercises.explanation: 'Distractions' = su xao nhang, mat tap trung >< 'attention' = su tap trung, chu y.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] He hoped the company would help him in finding <u>stable</u> accommodation.
exercises.explanation: 'Stable' = on dinh, lau dai >< 'short-term' = ngan han. Hai tu nay trai nghia nhau.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] <u>Before</u> you read, work in pairs, ask and answer the questions.
exercises.explanation: 'Before' = truoc khi >< 'After' = sau khi. Hai tu nay trai nghia nhau.

exercises.question: [OPPOSITE] She <u>received</u> a general education in local schools and some scientific training from her father.
exercises.explanation: 'Received' = nhan duoc >< 'gave' = cho, tang. Hai tu nay trai nghia nhau.
